entries.description: Operator confirmed via AskUserQuestion all three open questions per Claude's recommended answers: Q1 implementation lives in this repo (dabbler-ai-orchestration); Q2 narrower V1 categories list (refactor-placement, file-layout, scoping, spec-clarification); Q3 committed JSONL journal + gitignored consensus-decisions/ full-payload directory. Set-level NTE budget confirmed at $5. Answers recorded in ai-assignment.md for Session 2 reference.

Extended ai_router/router-config.yaml `delegation:` block with the new `decision_consensus` sub-block: enabled (default false), engines (default openai:gpt-5-4 + google:gemini-pro), V1 four-category list, unresolved_action enum (default ask_user), journal_path default (ai_router/consensus-decisions.jsonl), journal_full_payloads_dir default (ai_router/consensus-decisions). Inline comments cross-reference the workflow doc + design proposal.

Added `_validate_decision_consensus(config)` to ai_router/config.py invoked at load_config boundary alongside the existing tier_assignments check. Validates: enabled is bool; engines is list of 'provider:model' strings with each model resolvable in config['models'] AND named provider matching the model's registered provider; categories from the recognized V1+V1.5+V2 whitelist (forward-compat for opt-in expansion); unresolved_action ∈ {ask_user, proceed_with_orchestrator_judgment}; journal_path and journal_full_payloads_dir are strings or null. Unknown sub-keys tolerated for forward-compat. Default-opt-out: absent block passes silently. Mirrored in tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/configEditor/schemaValidator.ts (AJV) so the visual config editor accepts the same shape.

New module ai_router/consensus_journal.py (322 LOC). ConsensusRecord frozen dataclass mirrors the per-line shape from docs/planning/delegation-consensus-config.md. compute_question_hash returns sha256:-prefixed digest over (question_summary || category || timestamp); short_hash_from_full extracts the 6-char prefix for filenames. append_record opens journal_path in append mode, writes single JSON line, flushes, best-effort fsync (mirrors metrics.py precedent — POSIX append is atomic for sub-PIPE_BUF writes so no temp+rename required). write_full_payload uses temp+rename via os.replace for the Markdown sibling. write_consensus_record one-shot helper bundles both writes. validate_record_inputs guards the agreement_level + fallback_action enums. Module-level AGREEMENT_LEVELS and FALLBACK_ACTIONS tuples exposed so callers can import canonical names.

Two new test files: ai_router/tests/test_decision_consensus_schema.py (17 cases covering absent block, default shape, null payload dir, enabled-bool guard, engine 'provider:model' shape, unknown model, provider mismatch, V1.5/V2 forward-compat categories, unresolved_action enum, path-type guards, forward-compat unknown sub-keys) and ai_router/tests/test_consensus_journal.py (16 cases covering hash determinism + sensitivity, short-hash extraction + prefix guard, JSONL append + multi-line preservation + parent-dir creation, extras-merge with core-field protection, full-payload filename safety + content round-trip + no-leftover-temp, write_consensus_record optional-payload-dir logic, enum guards). Full ai_router suite at 633 passing + 1 skipped (was 599 at Set 030 close).

Added new top-level `## Decision-time consensus` section to docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (160 lines) between `## Delegation Discipline` and `## Rules (Apply to All Orchestrators)`. Contents: framing paragraph contrasting task delegation vs decision delegation; six-step decision tree (human-only filter → category whitelist → parallel route → synthesis → apply-or-fallback → journal write); V1 vs human-only category examples table covering all four V1 slugs; journal-format example record (JSON code block); opt-in path (3-step); three explicit limits-of-consensus guardrails (human-only categories, synthesis discipline, auditable journal).

Round-A end-of-session verification: ai_router.query(model='gemini-pro', task_type='session-verification', content=bundle). Bundle size 43,764 bytes (router-config.yaml slice + _validate_decision_consensus + full consensus_journal.py + both new test files + AJV mirror slice + new workflow-doc section). Response: 1,924 bytes, one Critical finding. Cost $0.020. Per memory feedback_ai_router_route_result_handling — RouteResult dumped to JSON at c:\tmp\verify-031-s1\result.json before attribute access.

Round-A Critical finding addressed: a model entry in config['models'] missing a 'provider' key would silently pass `_validate_decision_consensus`'s engine-mismatch check because the comparison short-circuited on empty model_provider. Fixed by adding an explicit `if not model_provider: raise` guard between the unknown-model and mismatch checks in ai_router/config.py. Regression test `test_engine_provider_missing_in_model_rejected` added to test_decision_consensus_schema.py. Full ai_router suite re-run: 33/33 of the new tests pass.
